rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees involving ports, implementation scopes for bindings
Insert implementation-level signal routing assignments in acc_process.impl scope after subcomponents and connections are defined
generic_rules: Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
Write guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs; avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in type contracts
Do not reference AADL properties like Compute_Execution_Time or unit tokens directly in AGREE expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax
Implementation scope contracts should not contain guarantee statements, only assignments
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency contracts
Do not encode event ports as numeric or Boolean values unless explicit data is provided in the model
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
assume/guarantee contract fusion and clause assignment
